questions.question_text: CO Mapping List any six Analog Design trade-offs.
What happens when a signal mode is hit by radioactive or cosmic particle? Differentiate between planar and Fin FET, with suitable diagrams
Name some digital faults. Explain any one and steps to rectify it.
Draw stick diagram of a CMOS inverter and label its layer information. List 5 differentiating factors of use of MOSFET as an amplifier and as a switch.
What is Built-in-self-test? Give its benefits over other tests.
What is Logic Optimization, list down its benefits & Classification? What is the objective of technology mapping, explain its significance?
What are the various steps involved in VLSI Testing? Discuss about the Test generation for combinational circuits
Name the leakage mechanisms influencing the performance of MOS during off-state. How is the performance of MOS affected by Trap assisted Tunneling?
Explain any Test generation one algorithms for Sequential Circuits.
